name: Exploring the Capacity of Large Language Models to Simulate Students' Scientific Thinking: Insights for Responsive Teaching
venue: Journal of Science Education and Technology
summary: Open-access journal article comparing GPT-5-mini, GPT-4o, Claude Sonnet 4, Gemini 2.5 Flash, Mistral 7B, and Llama-4-17B on simulation of open-ended student science ideas across domains and grade levels, with semantic similarity, language appropriateness, knowledge-scope, and teacher-perception evidence.

access_attempts.notes: Used abstract, methods, results, and limitations-relevant passages for extraction.
